session.user: Run pytest on the test file and report results. Command: pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_helpers.py -xvs
session.assistant: I'll run pytest on that test file and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on dispatch_helpers test file with verbose output

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 Syncing master with origin/master... ✓ master synced with origin/master Error: Local master has commits not pushed to origin/master.
Please push your local commits before running erk pr dispatch: git push origin master Error: Local master has diverged from origin/master.
To fix, sync your local branch: git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/master
Warning: This will discard any local commits on master. Syncing master with origin/master... ✓ master synced with origin/master Syncing master with origin/master... ✓ master synced with origin/master

tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_helpers.py .....F
=================================== FAILURES =================================== _______________ test_trunk_checked_out_with_dirty_worktree_exits _______________
... [25 lines omitted] ...
"""When trunk is checked out in a dirty worktree, exits with error.""" E Failed: DID NOT RAISE <class 'SystemExit'> tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_helpers.py:124: Failed FAILED tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_helpers.py::test_trunk_checked_out_with_dirty_worktree_exits - Failed: DID NOT RAISE <class 'SystemExit'> !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! ========================= 1 failed, 5 passed in 0.84s ==========================
session.assistant:
**pytest failed: 1 issue found**
**Summary:** 1 failed, 5 passed in 0.84s
**Failed Test:** - File: `tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_helpers.py` - Test: `test_trunk_checked_out_with_dirty_worktree_exits` - Line: 124 - Error: `Failed: DID NOT RAISE <class 'SystemExit'>` - Issue: The test expects a `SystemExit` exception to be raised when trunk is checked out in a dirty worktree, but no exception was raised.
The test is checking the error handling in the dispatch helpers when the trunk branch (master) is checked out with uncommitted changes, which should cause the program to exit with an error.
